evidence_rows.reading: V1.5 opened as candidacy review only, not as retained-feature promotion.
The bounded review already answers which features may stay in candidacy review and which still need more evidence.

interpretation: V1.5 has produced bounded admissibility judgments without crossing into promotion.
That means the phase now has a clear candidacy posture and does not need wider expansion to justify its existence.
The next legal step is a closure check, not an integration or model branch.
